verses.text: Israel mite, a mihon buppi, a kha masa sungin Zin gamlak tung uh a, Kadesh munah phual sat uh hi. Tua lai-ah Miriam si a, tua lai mahah kivui hi
Tu-in mihonte-a' ding tui omlo ahih manin Moses leh Aaron' langah amaute kikhawmin kituah uh hi
Mite, Moses tawh kiseelin, “ Topa' mai-ah ka sanggamte uh a sih lai-in a si hizaw hoh ta le ung
Bang hangin hih lai-ah kote leh ka ganhingte uh a si dingin Topa' mihonte hih gamlakah hong paipih na hi hiam

Bang hangin hih mun sia-ah hong paipih dingin Egypt panin kote hong paitosak na hi hiam? An ahi a, thei ahi a, leenggui ahi a, mang kawlsing ahi zongin a omna mun ahih loh banah tui dawn ding nangawn zong omlo hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin mihonte omna panin kikhopna bukkongah Moses leh Aaron pai-in boksuk uh hi. Topa' minthan'na vang amaute' tungah hong kilangin
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Ciangkhut la-in, nang leh na sanggampa Aaron in mihonte khawm un la, suangpi in amau' muhin tui a piak ding sawl un. Tua bangin mihonte leh amau' ganhingte tui na ngahsak ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Moses in zong Topa' thupiak bangin ciangkhut a la hi
Moses leh Aaron in suangpi mai-ah mihonte kaikhawmin amah in amaute kiangah, “Tu-in za un, a lehdo mite aw; hih suangpi panin note-a' ding tui hong phulkhiasak ding ka hi uh hiam?” a ci hi
Moses in a khut laamto-in a ciangkhut tawh tua suangpi nihvei sat a, tui tampi phulkhia-in mihonte leh amau' ganhingte in a dawn uh hi
Ahi zongin Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah, “Israel mite' mai-ah kei hong umlo, hong siangthosaklo na hih uh ciangin amaute ka piaksa leitangah hih mihonte na tun'pih kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Hihte pen, Israel mite in Topa a phunsanna, amaute lakah amahmah a siangtho-a a kilahna mun, Meribah tui phuala thupiang ahi hi.
Moses in Kadesh panin Edom kumpipa kiangah kamtaite sawl a, “Na sanggam Israel-te in hih bangin ci hi: Kote' tuahkhak kamsiatna khempeuh na thei hi
Ka pu ka pate uh Egypt-ah na paisukin Egypt-ah sauveipi ka teng uh a, Egypt mite in kote leh ka pu ka pate uh hong gimbawl hi
Topa' tungah ka kiko uh ciangin amah in ka aw uh hong za a, vantung mi khat hong sawlin, Egypt panin hong paikhiatpih a, tu-in nangma gam nawl Kadesh khuapi-ah ka om uh hi

Tu-in kote na gam hong kantansak in. Lo ahi a, leenggui lo ahi zongin nawkkha loin, tuikhuk panin zong tui ka dawn kei ding uh hi. Kumpipa' Lamlian dungah ka pai ding uh a, na gamsung ka khen' matengun lam ka pial kei ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Ahih hangin Edom mite in ama kiangah, “Nong nawk kei ding uh hi; nong nawk uh leh note langpangin namsau tawh kong kuan ding uh hi,” na ci hi

Israel mite in, “Lamlian tawnin ka paito ding uh hi. Kote leh ka ganhingte un na tui uh ka dawn uh leh, a man kong pia ding uh hi. Khe tawh pai-in hong nawksak un; adang kong ngen kei uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Edom mite in, “Nong nawk kei ding uh hi,” na ci uh hi. Amaute' langkhatah galkap tampi tawh Edom mite kuan hi
Israel mite, amau' gam a nawksak ding tua bangin Edom mite in nial uh ahih ciangin amau' kiang panin Israel mite paikhia uh hi.
Kadesh panin Israel-te pai uh a, a hon buppi-in Hor Mual tung uh hi
Edom gamgi Hor Mual-ah Topa in Moses leh Aaron' tungah
“Aaron in ama mite kiang zuan ta ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Meribah tui-ah note gel in ka thupiak hong nial na hih manun, Israel mite tungah ka piak leitangah amah tumlo ding hi
Aaron leh ama tapa Eleazar sam in la, Hor Mual-ah amaute paipih in
Aaron' tung panin a puante suahkhia in la, a tapa Eleazar silhsak in. Aaron in ama mite kiang zuan ta ding a, tua lai-ah si ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa' thupiak bangin Moses zong gamta hi. Mihonte khempeuh' muhin Hor Mual tungah amaute paito uh hi
Moses in Aaron' puante suahkhiatsakin a tapa Eleazar silhsak a, tua mual dawnah Aaron a si hi. Tua ciangin mualtung panin Moses leh Eleazar paisuk uh hi
Aaron si hi, ci-in mihonte khempeuh in a theih uh ciangin, Aaron' hangin Israel mi khempeuh ni sawmthum sung a kap uh hi.
